description: Handles the OIDC provider redirect after authentication. Returns a server-rendered HTML page that stores the session token in localStorage and redirects to the application. Query params are provided by the OIDC provider.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Authorization code from the OIDC provider

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State JWT from the authorization request

parameters.name: error
parameters.description: OAuth error code from the provider (e.g. access_denied)

200.description: HTML page that stores session and redirects

400.description: HTML error page for provider-sent errors
